channel.title: Home Barista on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Home Barista on Barista At Home

item.title: Getting Started with Home Espresso: The Complete Beginner's Guide
item.description: Everything you need to start brewing cafe-quality espresso at home. Covers equipment, grinders, technique, and common mistakes — written for complete beginners.

item.title: How Long Do Coffee Beans Last? Shelf Life & Storage Guide
item.description: Whole coffee beans last 2–4 weeks after opening for peak flavor, up to 3 months sealed. Ground coffee: 1–2 weeks. Here's exactly how long coffee lasts under every storage condition.
